text: Entering this brightly lit, modern space, I feel a quiet curiosity growing within me. The glass door creates a threshold, almost ritualistic, separating the open hallway from the thoughtful displays inside. As I step closer, the vivid colors and bold text of 'R+D' suggest innovation and human creativity—an invitation to contemplate how research and design shape our world. Observing the engaged conversations and artifacts, I am both observer and participant, reflecting on my own relationship to technology and knowledge. There’s a gentle awe in the air, tinged with anticipation to see what insights might emerge from this intersection of people and ideas.
